          schema: { type: number }
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer }
        - name: offset
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of providers
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProviderSummary"
    post:
      operationId: createProvider
      tags: [providers]
      summary: Create a provider profile
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProviderInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Provider"

  /providers/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getProvider
      tags: [providers]
      summary: Get provider details
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Provider detail
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Provider"
        "404":
          description: Not found
    patch:
      operationId: updateProvider
      tags: [providers]
      summary: Update provider profile
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProviderUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Provider"

  /providers/me:
    get:
      operationId: getMyProviderProfile
      tags: [providers]
      summary: Get the authenticated user's provider profile
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Provider profile
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Provider"
        "404":
          description: Not found (not yet a provider)

  /account/me:
    delete:
      operationId: deleteMyAccount
      tags: [account]
      summary: Permanently delete the current user's entire account (provider + customer data + login)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Account deleted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [deleted]
                properties:
                  deleted:
                    type: boolean
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized

  /account/role:
    get:
      operationId: getMyRole
      tags: [account]
      summary: Get the current user's role (customer | provider), or null if none claimed yet
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Current role
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AccountRole"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
    post:
      operationId: claimMyRole
      tags: [account]
      summary: Claim a role for the current user (fails 409 if the other role is already held)
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ClaimRoleBody"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Role after claim
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AccountRole"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "409":
          description: Account already holds the other role

  /providers/{id}/services:
    get:
      operationId: listProviderServices
      tags: [services]
      summary: List services for a provider
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of services
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Service"
    post:
      operationId: createService
      tags: [services]
      summary: Add a service to a provider
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ServiceInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Service"

  /services/{id}:
    patch:
      operationId: updateService
      tags: [services]
      summary: Update a service
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ServiceUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Service"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteService
      tags: [services]
      summary: Delete a service
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /providers/{id}/availability:
    get:
      operationId: listAvailability
      tags: [availability]
      summary: Get available time slots for a provider
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of time slots
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/TimeSlot"

  /availability:
    post:
      operationId: createTimeSlot
      tags: [availability]
      summary: Create a time slot
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/TimeSlotInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TimeSlot"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteTimeSlot
      tags: [availability]
      summary: Delete a time slot
      parameters:
        - name: slotId
          in: query
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /bookings:
    post:
      operationId: createBooking
      tags: [bookings]
      summary: Create a booking
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/BookingInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Booking created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Booking"
    get:
      operationId: listMyBookings
      tags: [bookings]
      summary: List bookings for the authenticated user (as customer)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of bookings
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Booking"

  /bookings/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getBooking
      tags: [bookings]
      summary: Get booking details
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Booking
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Booking"

  /bookings/{id}/status:
    patch:
      operationId: updateBookingStatus
      tags: [bookings]
      summary: Update booking status (confirm / cancel)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/BookingStatusUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated booking
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Booking"

  /providers/{id}/bookings:
    get:
      operationId: listProviderBookings
      tags: [bookings]
      summary: List bookings for a provider (dashboard)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of bookings
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Booking"

  /providers/me/ical-conflicts:
    get:
      operationId: listMyIcalConflicts
      tags: [providers]
      summary: List external-calendar conflicts with the authenticated provider's Klard bookings
      description: >-
        Returns the conflicts detected during external iCal sync where an
        imported busy interval overlapped an active Klard booking and was
        therefore skipped (the Klard booking wins). Lets the provider see and
        resolve the clash on their side.
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of iCal/booking conflicts
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/IcalBookingConflict"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "404":
          description: Provider profile not found

  /providers/{id}/reviews:
    get:
      operationId: listProviderReviews
      tags: [reviews]
      summary: List reviews for a provider
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Reviews
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Review"

  /reviews:
    post:
      operationId: createReview
      tags: [reviews]
      summary: Leave a review for a completed booking
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ReviewInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Review created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Review"

  /ai/offer:
    post:
      operationId: generateAiOffer
      tags: [ai]
      summary: Generate an AI offer for a service inquiry
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AiOfferRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Generated offer
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AiOfferResponse"

  /dashboard/provider/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getProviderDashboard
      tags: [dashboard]
      summary: Get provider dashboard summary
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Dashboard data
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProviderDashboard"

  /providers/me/subscription/checkout:
    post:
      operationId: createSubscriptionCheckout
      tags: [billing]
      summary: Create a Stripe Checkout Session for the Premium provider subscription
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Checkout session created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CheckoutSession"

  /providers/me/subscription:
    get:
      operationId: getMySubscription
      tags: [billing]
      summary: Get current provider subscription status
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Subscription status
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/SubscriptionStatus"
    delete:
      operationId: cancelMySubscription
      tags: [billing]
      summary: Cancel premium subscription at period end
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Cancelled
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/SubscriptionStatus"

  /bookings/{id}/payment/checkout:
    post:
      operationId: createBookingCheckout
      tags: [billing]
      summary: Create a Stripe Checkout Session for a booking payment
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Checkout session created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CheckoutSession"

  /providers/me/connect:
    get:
      operationId: getMyConnectStatus
      tags: [billing]
      summary: Get the signed-in provider's Stripe Connect (payout) status
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Connect status
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectStatus"

  /providers/me/connect/onboard:
    post:
      operationId: createConnectOnboarding
      tags: [billing]
      summary: Create a Stripe Connect Express account (if needed) and return an onboarding link
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Onboarding link created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectOnboardingLink"

  /providers/{id}/calendar.ics:
    get:
      operationId: getProviderCalendarFeed
      tags: [calendar]
      summary: iCal feed of confirmed bookings for a provider (token via ?token=)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: iCalendar (.ics) feed
          content:
            text/calendar:
              schema: { type: string }

  /bookings/{id}/calendar.ics:
    get:
      operationId: getBookingCalendarFile
      tags: [calendar]
      summary: Download .ics file for a single booking
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: iCalendar (.ics) file
          content:
            text/calendar:
              schema: { type: string }

  /assessments:
    get:
      operationId: listAssessments
      tags: [assessments]
      summary: List the current user's saved building assessments
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of assessments
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Assessment"
    post:
      operationId: createAssessment
      tags: [assessments]
      summary: Save a new building assessment for the current user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AssessmentInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Assessment"

  /assessments/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getAssessment
      tags: [assessments]
      summary: Get a single saved assessment (owner only)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Assessment
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Assessment"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteAssessment
      tags: [assessments]
      summary: Delete a saved assessment (owner only)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /gebaeudecheck/credits:
    get:
      operationId: getGebaeudecheckCredits
      tags: [gebaeudecheck]
      summary: Current user's Gebäudecheck report credit balance + package catalog
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Credit balance and available packages
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/GebaeudecheckCredits"

  /gebaeudecheck/checkout:
    post:
      operationId: createGebaeudecheckCheckout
      tags: [gebaeudecheck]
      summary: Create a Stripe Checkout Session to buy a Gebäudecheck credit package
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/GebaeudecheckCheckoutInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Checkout session created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CheckoutSession"

  /gebaeudecheck/reconcile:
    post:
      operationId: reconcileGebaeudecheckOrder
      tags: [gebaeudecheck]
      summary: Grant credits after a successful Checkout redirect (idempotent)
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/GebaeudecheckReconcileInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Reconcile result
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/GebaeudecheckReconcileResult"

  /foerderschiene/programme:
    get:
      operationId: listFoerderProgramme
      tags: [foerderschiene]
      summary: List all active funding programs (Förderprogramme)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of funding programs
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/FoerderProgramm"

  /foerderschiene/match:
    post:
      operationId: matchFoerderschiene
      tags: [foerderschiene]
      summary: Match a building profile to eligible funding programs + cost estimates
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/FoerderMatchInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Matched programs and recommended measures
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/FoerderMatchResult"

  /foerderschiene/report/checkout:
    post:
      operationId: createReportCheckout
      tags: [foerderschiene]
      summary: Create a Stripe Checkout Session to buy the detailed Gebäudereport PDF
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ReportCheckoutInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Checkout session created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CheckoutSession"

  /foerderschiene/report/reconcile:
    post:
      operationId: reconcileReport
      tags: [foerderschiene]
      summary: Unlock a paid report after the Checkout redirect (idempotent)
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/GebaeudecheckReconcileInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Reconcile result
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/FoerderschieneReport"

  /foerderschiene/reports:
    get:
      operationId: listMyReports
      tags: [foerderschiene]
      summary: List the current user's saved Gebäudereports
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of reports
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/FoerderschieneReport"

  /foerderschiene/energieausweis/checkout:
    post:
      operationId: createEnergieausweisCheckout
      tags: [foerderschiene]
      summary: Create a paid Energieausweis order + Stripe Checkout Session (fulfilled by a certified Aussteller)
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/EnergieausweisOrderInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Checkout session created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CheckoutSession"

  /foerderschiene/energieausweis/reconcile:
    post:
      operationId: reconcileEnergieausweis
      tags: [foerderschiene]
      summary: Mark an Energieausweis order paid after the Checkout redirect (idempotent)
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/GebaeudecheckReconcileInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The order after reconcile
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/EnergieausweisOrder"

  /foerderschiene/energieausweis/orders:
    get:
      operationId: listMyEnergieausweisOrders
      tags: [foerderschiene]
      summary: List the current user's Energieausweis orders + their issuer status
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of orders
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/EnergieausweisOrder"

  /offers/accept:
    post:
      operationId: acceptOffer
      tags: [offers]
      summary: Customer legally accepts an offer (selected services) from a provider
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AcceptOfferInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Offer accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/OfferAcceptance"

  /offers/mine:
    get:
      operationId: listMyOffers
      tags: [offers]
      summary: List offers the current user has accepted
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of accepted offers
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/OfferAcceptance"

  /requests:
    post:
      operationId: createRequest
      tags: [requests]
      summary: Post an open request (Anfrage). Public — works for guests and logged-in customers.
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/RequestInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Request created, matching providers notified
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateRequestResult"

  /requests/mine:
    get:
      operationId: listMyRequests
      tags: [requests]
      summary: List the logged-in customer's own requests
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of requests
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/RfqRequest"

  /requests/access:
    post:
      operationId: accessRequest
      tags: [requests]
      summary: >-
        Fetch a single request together with its received offers. Works for the
        owning logged-in customer, or for a guest who presents the one-time
        access token (passed in the body, never the query string, so it is not
        logged).
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/RequestAccessInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The request with its offers
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RequestWithOffers"

  /request-offers/{id}/accept:
    post:
      operationId: acceptRequestOffer
      tags: [requests]
      summary: Customer accepts a provider's offer (owning customer, or a guest who presents the access token in the body)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      requestBody:
        required: false
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AcceptRequestOfferInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The accepted offer
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RfqOffer"

  /providers/me/requests:
    get:
      operationId: listProviderRequests
      tags: [requests]
      summary: Matched requests for the signed-in provider (contact anonymized until an offer is sent)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Matched requests
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/RfqRequestForProvider"

  /providers/me/requests/{requestId}:
    get:
      operationId: getProviderRequest
      tags: [requests]
      summary: A single matched request for the signed-in provider (sets viewed); contact anonymized until offered
      parameters:
        - name: requestId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The matched request
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RfqRequestForProvider"

  /providers/me/requests/{requestId}/offers:
    post:
      operationId: createProviderOffer
      tags: [requests]
      summary: Send an offer on a request (charges the server-computed lead fee from the wallet)
      parameters:
        - name: requestId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProviderOfferInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Offer sent
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateOfferResult"

  /providers/me/wallet:
    get:
      operationId: getMyWallet
      tags: [requests]
      summary: The signed-in provider's lead wallet (balance, recent transactions, tier entitlements)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Wallet status
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/WalletStatus"

  /providers/me/wallet/topup:
    post:
      operationId: createWalletTopup
      tags: [requests]
      summary: Create a Stripe Checkout Session to top up the lead wallet
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/WalletTopupInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Checkout session created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CheckoutSession"

  /leads/{leadFeeId}/refund:
    post:
      operationId: refundLead
      tags: [requests]
      summary: Lead-Garantie — refund a dead lead fee back to the provider's wallet (provider owner only)
      parameters:
        - name: leadFeeId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      requestBody:
        required: false
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/LeadRefundInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Refund applied
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/LeadRefundResult"

  /immobilien-kunde/me:
    get:
      operationId: getMyImmobilienKunde
      tags: [immobilienKunde]
      summary: Current user's Immobilien-Kundenprofil (Hausverwalter/Bestandshalter)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The profile, or null if none exists
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - $ref: "#/components/schemas/ImmobilienKunde"
                  - type: "null"
    put:
      operationId: upsertMyImmobilienKunde
      tags: [immobilienKunde]
      summary: Create or update the current user's Immobilien-Kundenprofil
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ImmobilienKundeInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The saved profile
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ImmobilienKunde"

  /immobilien-portfolio/objekte:
    get:
      operationId: listImmobilienPortfolioObjekte
      tags: [immobilienPortfolio]
      summary: List the current user's Immobilienportfolio properties
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The user's portfolio properties
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/ImmobilienPortfolioObjekt"
    post:
      operationId: createImmobilienPortfolioObjekt
      tags: [immobilienPortfolio]
      summary: Add a property to the current user's portfolio
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ImmobilienPortfolioObjektInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: The created property
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ImmobilienPortfolioObjekt"

  /immobilien-portfolio/objekte/{id}:
    put:
      operationId: updateImmobilienPortfolioObjekt
      tags: [immobilienPortfolio]
      summary: Update one of the current user's portfolio properties
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ImmobilienPortfolioObjektInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The updated property
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ImmobilienPortfolioObjekt"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteImmobilienPortfolioObjekt
      tags: [immobilienPortfolio]
      summary: Delete one of the current user's portfolio properties
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /verwaltete-kunden:
    get:
      operationId: listVerwalteteKunden
      tags: [verwalteteKunden]
      summary: List the current user's verwaltete/betreute Kunden
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The user's managed clients
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/VerwalteterKunde"
    post:
      operationId: createVerwalteterKunde
      tags: [verwalteteKunden]
      summary: Add a managed client
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/VerwalteterKundeInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: The created client
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/VerwalteterKunde"

  /verwaltete-kunden/{id}:
    put:
      operationId: updateVerwalteterKunde
      tags: [verwalteteKunden]
      summary: Update one of the current user's managed clients
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/VerwalteterKundeInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The updated client
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/VerwalteterKunde"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteVerwalteterKunde
      tags: [verwalteteKunden]
      summary: Delete one of the current user's managed clients
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /customer-profile/me:
    get:
      operationId: getMyCustomerProfile
      tags: [customerProfile]
      summary: Current user's basic customer profile (address + preferences)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The profile, or null if none exists
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - $ref: "#/components/schemas/CustomerProfile"
                  - type: "null"
    put:
      operationId: upsertMyCustomerProfile
      tags: [customerProfile]
      summary: Create or update the current user's basic customer profile
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CustomerProfileInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: The saved profile
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CustomerProfile"

  /providers/me/invoice-settings:
    get:
      operationId: getMyInvoiceSettings
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Get the authenticated provider's invoice settings
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Invoice settings
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/InvoiceSettings"
    patch:
      operationId: updateMyInvoiceSettings
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Update the authenticated provider's invoice settings
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/InvoiceSettingsUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated invoice settings
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/InvoiceSettings"

  /invoices/me:
    get:
      operationId: listMyProviderInvoices
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: List invoices issued by the authenticated provider
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of invoices
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Invoice"

  /invoices/customer:
    get:
      operationId: listMyCustomerInvoices
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: List invoices received by the authenticated customer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of invoices
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Invoice"

  /invoices/{id}/pdf:
    get:
      operationId: getInvoicePdf
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Download an invoice PDF (provider owner or booking customer)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: PDF
          content:
            application/pdf:
              schema:
                type: string
                format: binary

  /bookings/{id}/invoice:
    post:
      operationId: issueInvoiceForBooking
      tags: [invoices]
      summary: Manually issue (or re-fetch) the invoice for a paid booking
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Invoice
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Invoice"

  /dashboard/stats:
    get:
      operationId: getPlatformStats
      tags: [dashboard]
      summary: Platform-level stats (total providers, categories, bookings)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Platform stats
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/PlatformStats"

  /admin/me:
    get:
      operationId: getAdminMe
      tags: [admin]
      summary: Returns whether the current user is an admin
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Admin status
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AdminMe"

  /admin/stats:
    get:
      operationId: getAdminStats
      tags: [admin]
      summary: Platform-wide aggregate statistics
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Stats
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AdminStats"

  /admin/timeseries:
    get:
      operationId: getAdminTimeseries
      tags: [admin]
      summary: Daily bookings and revenue time-series
      parameters:
        - name: days
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 365, default: 30 }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Daily points
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/AdminTimeseriesPoint"

  /admin/providers:
    get:
      operationId: listAdminProviders
      tags: [admin]
      summary: All providers with usage metrics
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Providers
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/AdminProviderRow"

  /admin/providers/{id}/approval:
    patch:
      operationId: updateAdminProviderApproval
      tags: [admin]
      summary: Approve or reject a provider profile
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AdminProviderApprovalUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated provider row
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AdminProviderRow"
        "400":
          description: Invalid request
        "404":
          description: Provider not found

  /admin/customers:
    get:
      operationId: listAdminCustomers
      tags: [admin]
      summary: Distinct customers with booking aggregates
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Customers
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/AdminCustomerRow"

  /admin/bookings:
    get:
      operationId: listAdminBookings
      tags: [admin]
      summary: Recent bookings across the platform
      parameters:
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 500, default: 100 }
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema: { type: string, enum: [pending, confirmed, completed, cancelled] }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Bookings
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/AdminBookingRow"

  /admin/categories:
    get:
      operationId: listAdminCategories
      tags: [admin]
      summary: Category breakdown with booking and revenue counts
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Categories
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/AdminCategoryRow"

  /energie/verwalter/me:
    get:
      operationId: getMyVerwalter
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Get the current user's Verwalter (energy portfolio) account, or null
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Verwalter account or null
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Verwalter"
                  - type: "null"
    post:
      operationId: createMyVerwalter
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Onboard the current user as a Verwalter
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/VerwalterInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Verwalter"
    patch:
      operationId: updateMyVerwalter
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Update the current user's Verwalter account
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/VerwalterInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Verwalter"

  /energie/portfolio:
    get:
      operationId: getEnergiePortfolio
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Portfolio KPIs and full object/meter/contract tree
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Portfolio overview
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/PortfolioOverview"

  /energie/objekte:
    post:
      operationId: createObjekt
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Add a building (Objekt) to the portfolio
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ObjektInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Objekt"

  /energie/objekte/{id}:
    delete:
      operationId: deleteObjekt
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Delete a building (owner only)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /energie/zaehlpunkte:
    post:
      operationId: createZaehlpunkt
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Add a metering point (Zählpunkt) to a building
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ZaehlpunktInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Zaehlpunkt"

  /energie/zaehlpunkte/{id}:
    delete:
      operationId: deleteZaehlpunkt
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Delete a metering point (owner only)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /energie/vertraege:
    post:
      operationId: createVertrag
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Record the current supply contract for a metering point
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/VertragInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Vertrag"

  /energie/vollmachten:
    get:
      operationId: listVollmachten
      tags: [energie]
      summary: List the Verwalter's powers of attorney
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of Vollmachten
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Vollmacht"
    post:
      operationId: createVollmacht
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Grant a new power of attorney
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/VollmachtInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Vollmacht"

  /energie/vollmachten/{id}/status:
    patch:
      operationId: updateVollmachtStatus
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Change a power of attorney's status (activate, pause, revoke)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/VollmachtStatusUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Vollmacht"

  /energie/wechsel:
    get:
      operationId: listWechselvorgaenge
      tags: [energie]
      summary: List switch processes across the portfolio
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of switch processes
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Wechselvorgang"

  /energie/wechsel/analyse:
    post:
      operationId: starteAnalyse
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Start an AI tariff analysis for a metering point
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AnalyseInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Switch process created with recommendation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Wechselvorgang"

  /energie/wechsel/{id}/freigeben:
    post:
      operationId: freigebenWechsel
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Approve a switch (runs the simulated market execution)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated switch process
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Wechselvorgang"

  /energie/wechsel/{id}/ablehnen:
    post:
      operationId: ablehnenWechsel
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Reject a recommended switch
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated switch process
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Wechselvorgang"

  /energie/wechsel/{id}/widersprechen:
    post:
      operationId: widersprechenWechsel
      tags: [energie]
      summary: Object to a switch within the objection window
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: integer }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated switch process
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Wechselvorgang"

  /energie/audit:
    get:
      operationId: listAuditLog
      tags: [energie]
      summary: List the Verwalter's audit trail
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Audit entries
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/AuditEntry"

  /energie/tarife:
    get:
      operationId: listTarife
      tags: [energie]
      summary: List available tariff offers (transparency feed)
      parameters:
        - name: sparte
          in: query
          required: false
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Tariff offers
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/TarifAngebot"

components:
  schemas:
    AdminMe:
      type: object
      required: [isAdmin]
      properties:
        isAdmin: { type: boolean }

    AccountRole:
      type: object
      required: [role]
      properties:
        role:
          type: ["string", "null"]
          enum: [customer, provider, null]
          description: The role bound to this account, or null if none has been claimed.

    ClaimRoleBody:
      type: object
      required: [role]
      properties:
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [customer, provider]

    Verwalter:
      type: object
      required: [id, clerkUserId, firma, typ, erlaubnis34c, provisionsmodell, aktiv, createdAt]
      properties:
        id: { type: integer }
        clerkUserId: { type: string }
        firma: { type: string }
        typ: { type: string }
        handelsregisterNr: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        ustId: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        erlaubnis34c: { type: boolean }
        strasse: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        plz: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        ort: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        email: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        telefon: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        provisionsmodell: { type: string }
        aktiv: { type: boolean }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }
        updatedAt: { type: string, format: date-time }

    VerwalterInput:
      type: object
      required: [firma, typ]
      properties:
        firma: { type: string, minLength: 1, maxLength: 200 }
        typ: { type: string, enum: [hausverwaltung, weg_verwalter, bestandshalter, gewerbe] }
        handelsregisterNr: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        ustId: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        erlaubnis34c: { type: boolean }
        strasse: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        plz: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        ort: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        email: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        telefon: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        provisionsmodell: { type: string, enum: [saas_flat, erfolgsprovision, hybrid] }

    Objekt:
      type: object
      required: [id, verwalterId, bezeichnung, strasse, plz, ort, wegBeschluss, createdAt]
      properties:
        id: { type: integer }
        verwalterId: { type: integer }
        bezeichnung: { type: string }
        strasse: { type: string }
        plz: { type: string }
        ort: { type: string }
        wegBeschluss: { type: boolean }
        wegBeschlussDatum: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        notiz: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }

    ObjektInput:
      type: object
      required: [bezeichnung, strasse, plz, ort]
      properties:
        bezeichnung: { type: string, minLength: 1, maxLength: 200 }
        strasse: { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        plz: { type: string, minLength: 4, maxLength: 5 }
        ort: { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        wegBeschluss: { type: boolean }
        wegBeschlussDatum: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        notiz: { type: ["string", "null"] }

    Zaehlpunkt:
      type: object
      required: [id, objektId, sparte, art, createdAt]
      properties:
        id: { type: integer }
        objektId: { type: integer }
        sparte: { type: string }
        art: { type: string }
        maloId: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        zaehlernummer: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        jahresverbrauchKwh: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        jahresverbrauchLiter: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        netzbetreiber: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }

    ZaehlpunktInput:
      type: object
      required: [objektId, sparte]
      properties:
        objektId: { type: integer }
        sparte: { type: string, enum: [strom, gas, heizoel, fernwaerme] }
        art: { type: string, enum: [allgemeinstrom, mieterstrom, gewerbe, heizung, waermepumpe, sonstige] }
        maloId: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        zaehlernummer: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        jahresverbrauchKwh: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        jahresverbrauchLiter: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        netzbetreiber: { type: ["string", "null"] }

    Vertrag:
      type: object
      required: [id, zaehlpunktId, versorger, kuendigungsfristTage, istAktiv, quelle, createdAt]
      properties:
        id: { type: integer }
        zaehlpunktId: { type: integer }
        versorger: { type: string }
        tarifname: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        arbeitspreisCtKwh: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        grundpreisEurJahr: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        vertragsbeginn: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        erstlaufzeitEnde: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        kuendigungsfristTage: { type: integer }
        naechsterKuendigungstermin: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        preisgarantieBis: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        istAktiv: { type: boolean }
        quelle: { type: string }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }

    VertragInput:
      type: object
      required: [zaehlpunktId, versorger]
      properties:
        zaehlpunktId: { type: integer }
        versorger: { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        tarifname: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        arbeitspreisCtKwh: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        grundpreisEurJahr: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        vertragsbeginn: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        erstlaufzeitEnde: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        kuendigungsfristTage: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        naechsterKuendigungstermin: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        preisgarantieBis: { type: ["string", "null"] }

    Vollmacht:
      type: object
      required: [id, verwalterId, status, modus, darfKuendigen, darfAbschliessen, darfSonderkuendigung, darfDatenAbfragen, darfBankdatenWeitergeben, widerspruchsfristTage, createdAt]
      properties:
        id: { type: integer }
        verwalterId: { type: integer }
        objektId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        sparte: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        status: { type: string }
        modus: { type: string }
        darfKuendigen: { type: boolean }
        darfAbschliessen: { type: boolean }
        darfSonderkuendigung: { type: boolean }
        darfDatenAbfragen: { type: boolean }
        darfBankdatenWeitergeben: { type: boolean }
        widerspruchsfristTage: { type: integer }
        gueltigAb: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        gueltigBis: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        erteiltAm: { type: ["string", "null"], format: date-time }
        widerrufenAm: { type: ["string", "null"], format: date-time }
        widerrufGrund: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        dokumentPfad: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }

    VollmachtInput:
      type: object
      required: [modus]
      properties:
        objektId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        sparte: { type: ["string", "null"], enum: [strom, gas, heizoel, fernwaerme, null] }
        modus: { type: string, enum: [nur_vorschlag, freigabe_erforderlich, vollautomatisch] }
        darfKuendigen: { type: boolean }
        darfAbschliessen: { type: boolean }
        darfSonderkuendigung: { type: boolean }
        darfDatenAbfragen: { type: boolean }
        darfBankdatenWeitergeben: { type: boolean }
        widerspruchsfristTage: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 60 }
        gueltigAb: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        gueltigBis: { type: ["string", "null"] }

    VollmachtStatusUpdate:
      type: object
      required: [status]
      properties:
        status: { type: string, enum: [aktiv, pausiert, widerrufen, abgelaufen] }
        widerrufGrund: { type: ["string", "null"] }

    Wechselvorgang:
      type: object
      required: [id, zaehlpunktId, vollmachtId, status, createdAt]
      properties:
        id: { type: integer }
        zaehlpunktId: { type: integer }
        vollmachtId: { type: integer }
        altVertragId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        status: { type: string }
        empfVersorger: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        empfTarif: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        empfArbeitspreisCtKwh: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        empfGrundpreisEurJahr: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        ersparnisEurJahr: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        ersparnisProzent: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        anzahlVerglicheneAnbieter: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        kiBegruendung: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        freigegebenAm: { type: ["string", "null"], format: date-time }
        widerspruchBis: { type: ["string", "null"], format: date-time }
        neuVertragId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        abgeschlossenAm: { type: ["string", "null"], format: date-time }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }
        updatedAt: { type: string, format: date-time }

    AnalyseInput:
      type: object
      required: [zaehlpunktId]
      properties:
        zaehlpunktId: { type: integer }
        vollmachtId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }

    AuditEntry:
      type: object
      required: [id, akteur, aktion, zeitpunkt]
      properties:
        id: { type: integer }
        verwalterId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        vollmachtId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        wechselId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        akteur: { type: string }
        aktion: { type: string }
        details:
          type: ["object", "null"]
          additionalProperties: true
        zeitpunkt: { type: string, format: date-time }

    TarifAngebot:
      type: object
      required: [id, sparte, versorger, tarifname, arbeitspreisCtKwh, grundpreisEurJahr, oekostrom]
      properties:
        id: { type: integer }
        sparte: { type: string }
        versorger: { type: string }
        tarifname: { type: string }
        arbeitspreisCtKwh: { type: number }
        grundpreisEurJahr: { type: number }
        laufzeitMonate: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        preisgarantieMonate: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        oekostrom: { type: boolean }
        minVerbrauchKwh: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        maxVerbrauchKwh: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        plzGebiet: { type: ["string", "null"] }

    PortfolioKpi:
      type: object
      required: [anzahlObjekte, anzahlZaehlpunkte, aktiveVertraege, kuendigungen60Tage, realisierteErsparnisEur, potenzialErsparnisEur]
      properties:
        anzahlObjekte: { type: integer }
        anzahlZaehlpunkte: { type: integer }
        aktiveVertraege: { type: integer }
        kuendigungen60Tage: { type: integer }
        realisierteErsparnisEur: { type: number }
        potenzialErsparnisEur: { type: number }

    PortfolioZaehlpunkt:
      type: object
      required: [zaehlpunkt]
      properties:
        zaehlpunkt: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/Zaehlpunkt" }
        vertrag:
          oneOf:
            - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Vertrag"
            - type: "null"

    PortfolioObjekt:
      type: object
      required: [objekt, zaehlpunkte]
      properties:
        objekt: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/Objekt" }
        zaehlpunkte:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PortfolioZaehlpunkt"

    PortfolioOverview:
      type: object
      required: [kpi, objekte]
      properties:
        kpi: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/PortfolioKpi" }
        objekte:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PortfolioObjekt"

    AdminStats:
      type: object
      required: [bookings, providers, customers, categories, reviews, invoices]
      properties:
        bookings:
          type: object
          required: [total, pending, confirmed, completed, cancelled, revenueAll, revenuePaidCents]
          properties:
            total: { type: integer }
            pending: { type: integer }
            confirmed: { type: integer }
            completed: { type: integer }
            cancelled: { type: integer }
            revenueAll: { type: integer }
            revenuePaidCents: { type: integer }
        providers:
          type: object
          required: [total, premium, verified, pending, approved, rejected]
          properties:
            total: { type: integer }
            premium: { type: integer }
            verified: { type: integer }
            pending: { type: integer }
            approved: { type: integer }
            rejected: { type: integer }
        customers:
          type: object
          required: [total]
          properties:
            total: { type: integer }
        categories:
          type: object
          required: [total]
          properties:
            total: { type: integer }
        reviews:
          type: object
          required: [total, averageRating]
          properties:
            total: { type: integer }
            averageRating: { type: number }
        invoices:
          type: object
          required: [total, storno, totalCents]
          properties:
            total: { type: integer }
            storno: { type: integer }
            totalCents: { type: integer }

    AdminTimeseriesPoint:
      type: object
      required: [day, bookings, paidRevenueCents]
      properties:
        day: { type: string }
        bookings: { type: integer }
        paidRevenueCents: { type: integer }

    AdminProviderRow:
      type: object
      required: [id, displayName, email, category, categorySlug, city, subscriptionTier, verified, approvalStatus, rating, reviewCount, createdAt, bookingCount, paidRevenueCents, distinctCustomers]
      properties:
        id: { type: integer }
        displayName: { type: string }
        email: { type: string }
        category: { type: string }
        categorySlug: { type: string }
        city: { type: string }
        subscriptionTier: { type: string }
        verified: { type: boolean }
        approvalStatus: { type: string, enum: [pending, approved, rejected] }
        rejectionReason: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        reviewedAt: { type: ["string", "null"], format: date-time }
        rating: { type: number }
        reviewCount: { type: integer }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }
        bookingCount: { type: integer }
        paidRevenueCents: { type: integer }
        distinctCustomers: { type: integer }

    AdminProviderApprovalUpdate:
      type: object
      required: [status]
      properties:
        status: { type: string, enum: [approved, rejected] }
        rejectionReason: { type: string }

    AdminCustomerRow:
      type: object
      required: [customerId, bookingCount, paidCount, totalSpentCents, firstBooking, lastBooking]
      properties:
        customerId: { type: string }
        customerName: { type: string, nullable: true }
        customerEmail: { type: string, nullable: true }
        bookingCount: { type: integer }
        paidCount: { type: integer }
        totalSpentCents: { type: integer }
        firstBooking: { type: string, format: date-time }
        lastBooking: { type: string, format: date-time }

    AdminBookingRow:
      type: object
      required: [id, customerId, providerId, providerName, serviceName, status, paymentStatus, totalPrice, scheduledAt, createdAt]
      properties:
        id: { type: integer }
        customerId: { type: string }
        customerName: { type: string, nullable: true }
        customerEmail: { type: string, nullable: true }
        providerId: { type: integer }
        providerName: { type: string }
        serviceName: { type: string }
        status: { type: string }
        paymentStatus: { type: string }
        totalPrice: { type: number }
        scheduledAt: { type: string, format: date-time }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }

    AdminCategoryRow:
      type: object
      required: [slug, name, requiresDirectBilling, providerCount, bookingCount, paidRevenueCents]
      properties:
        slug: { type: string }
        name: { type: string }
        requiresDirectBilling: { type: boolean }
        providerCount: { type: integer }
        bookingCount: { type: integer }
        paidRevenueCents: { type: integer }

    HealthStatus:
      type: object
      required: [status]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string

    Category:
      type: object
      required: [id, name, slug, icon]
      properties:
        id:    { type: integer }
        name:  { type: string }
        slug:  { type: string }
        icon:  { type: string }
        description:   { type: ["string", "null"] }
        color:         { type: ["string", "null"] }
        colorLight:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        displayOrder:  { type: integer }
        providerCount: { type: integer }
        requiresDirectBilling: { type: boolean }
        qualifications:
          type: ["object", "null"]
          additionalProperties: true
        worldId:        { type: ["string", "null"] }
        areaId:         { type: ["string", "null"] }
        professionCode: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        pricingModel:   { type: ["string", "null"], enum: [now, lead, hybrid, null] }
        indicativePrice: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        priceUnit:      { type: ["string", "null"] }
        exampleServices: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        requirements:
          type: ["array", "null"]
          items: { type: string }

    World:
      type: object
      required: [id, title, defaultPricingModel, displayOrder]
      properties:
        id:          { type: string }
        title:       { type: string }
        description: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        defaultPricingModel: { type: string, enum: [now, lead, hybrid] }
        displayOrder: { type: integer }

    Area:
      type: object
      required: [id, worldId, code, name, displayOrder]
      properties:
        id:          { type: string }
        worldId:     { type: string }
        code:        { type: string }
        num:         { type: ["string", "null"] }
        name:        { type: string }
        description: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        displayOrder: { type: integer }

    Classification:
      type: object
      required: [worlds, areas]
      properties:
        worlds:
          type: array
          items: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/World" }
        areas:
          type: array
          items: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/Area" }

    ProviderSummary:
      type: object
      required: [id, displayName, category, city, zip, rating, reviewCount, minPrice]
      properties:
        id:          { type: integer }
        displayName: { type: string }
        category:    { type: string }
        categorySlug: { type: string }
        city:        { type: string }
        zip:         { type: string }
        rating:      { type: number }
        reviewCount: { type: integer }
        minPrice:    { type: number }
        bio:         { type: ["string", "null"] }
        avatarUrl:   { type: ["string", "null"] }
        logoUrl:     { type: ["string", "null"] }
        yearsExperience: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        verified:    { type: boolean }
        subscriptionTier: { type: string, enum: [basic, premium] }
        requiresDirectBilling: { type: boolean }

    Provider:
      type: object
      required: [id, clerkUserId, displayName, category, city, zip, rating, reviewCount, approvalStatus]
      properties:
        id:           { type: integer }
        clerkUserId:  { type: string }
        displayName:  { type: string }
        email:        { type: string }
        phone:        { type: ["string", "null"] }
        bio:          { type: ["string", "null"] }
        category:     { type: string }
        categorySlug: { type: string }
        city:         { type: string }
        zip:          { type: string }
        address:      { type: ["string", "null"] }
        website:      { type: ["string", "null"] }
        avatarUrl:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        logoUrl:      { type: ["string", "null"] }
        yearsExperience: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        rating:       { type: number }
        reviewCount:  { type: integer }
        verified:     { type: boolean }
        approvalStatus: { type: string, enum: [pending, approved, rejected] }
        rejectionReason: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        reviewedAt:     { type: ["string", "null"] }
        subscriptionTier: { type: string, enum: [basic, premium] }
        requiresDirectBilling: { type: boolean }
        premiumSince:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        icalToken:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        calendarSyncUrl: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        companyLegalName: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        taxId:           { type: ["string", "null"] }
        responseTime:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        consultationMode: { type: string, enum: [online, in-person, both] }
        certificates:    { type: array, items: { type: string } }
        externalIcalUrl: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        stripeAccountId: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        stripeOnboarded: { type: boolean }
        qualifications:
          type: ["object", "null"]
          additionalProperties: true
        createdAt:    { type: string }

    ProviderInput:
      type: object
      required: [displayName, category, city, zip]
      properties:
        displayName:  { type: string }
        bio:          { type: string }
        category:     { type: string }
        city:         { type: string }
        zip:          { type: string }
        address:      { type: string }
        phone:        { type: string }
        website:      { type: string }
        logoUrl:      { type: string }
        yearsExperience: { type: integer }
        companyLegalName: { type: string }
        taxId:        { type: string }
        responseTime: { type: string }
        consultationMode: { type: string, enum: [online, in-person, both] }
        certificates: { type: array, items: { type: string } }
        externalIcalUrl: { type: string }
        qualifications:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ProviderUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        displayName:  { type: string }
        bio:          { type: string }
        category:     { type: string }
        city:         { type: string }
        zip:          { type: string }
        address:      { type: string }
        phone:        { type: string }
        website:      { type: string }
        avatarUrl:    { type: string }
        logoUrl:      { type: string }
        yearsExperience: { type: integer }
        companyLegalName: { type: string }
        taxId:        { type: string }
        responseTime: { type: string }
        consultationMode: { type: string, enum: [online, in-person, both] }
        certificates: { type: array, items: { type: string } }
        externalIcalUrl: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        qualifications:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    Service:
      type: object
      required: [id, providerId, name, price, durationMinutes, vatRate]
      properties:
        id:              { type: integer }
        providerId:      { type: integer }
        name:            { type: string }
        description:     { type: ["string", "null"] }
        price:           { type: number }
        netPrice:        { type: ["number", "null"] }
        vatRate:         { type: number }
        durationMinutes: { type: integer }
        createdAt:       { type: string }

    ServiceInput:
      type: object
      required: [name, durationMinutes]
      properties:
        name:            { type: string }
        description:     { type: string }
        price:           { type: number }
        netPrice:        { type: number }
        vatRate:         { type: number }
        durationMinutes: { type: integer }

    ServiceUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:            { type: string }
        description:     { type: string }
        price:           { type: number }
        netPrice:        { type: number }
        vatRate:         { type: number }
        durationMinutes: { type: integer }

    ServiceTemplate:
      type: object
      required: [id, categorySlug, name, defaultDurationMinutes]
      properties:
        id:                     { type: integer }
        categorySlug:           { type: string }
        groupName:              { type: ["string", "null"] }
        name:                   { type: string }
        description:            { type: ["string", "null"] }
        priceType:              { type: ["string", "null"], enum: [fix, hr, pa, hoai, on, null] }
        referencePrice:         { type: ["string", "null"] }
        durationLabel:          { type: ["string", "null"] }
        defaultDurationMinutes: { type: integer }
        defaultPrice:           { type: ["number", "null"] }
        priceMin:               { type: ["number", "null"] }
        priceAvg:               { type: ["number", "null"] }
        priceMax:               { type: ["number", "null"] }
        unit:                   { type: ["string", "null"] }
        inputs:                 { type: ["array", "null"], items: { type: string } }
        fundable:               { type: ["string", "null"] }
        notes:                  { type: ["string", "null"] }
        sortOrder:              { type: integer }

    UploadUrlRequest:
      type: object
      required: [name, contentType]
      properties:
        name:        { type: string }
        size:        { type: integer }
        contentType: { type: string }

    UploadUrlResponse:
      type: object
      required: [uploadURL, objectPath]
      properties:
        uploadURL:  { type: string }
        objectPath: { type: string }

    TimeSlot:
      type: object
      required: [id, providerId, startTime, endTime, isAvailable]
      properties:
        id:          { type: integer }
        providerId:  { type: integer }
        startTime:   { type: string, format: date-time }
        endTime:     { type: string, format: date-time }
        isAvailable: { type: boolean }

    TimeSlotInput:
      type: object
      required: [providerId, startTime, endTime]
      properties:
        providerId:  { type: integer }
        startTime:   { type: string, format: date-time }
        endTime:     { type: string, format: date-time }

    Booking:
      type: object
      required: [id, customerId, providerId, serviceId, slotId, status, totalPrice, scheduledAt]
      properties:
        id:           { type: integer }
        customerId:   { type: string }
        customerName: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        providerId:   { type: integer }
        providerName: { type: string }
        serviceId:    { type: integer }
        serviceName:  { type: string }
        slotId:       { type: integer }
        status:       { type: string, enum: [pending, confirmed, cancelled, completed] }
        totalPrice:   { type: number }
        scheduledAt:  { type: string, format: date-time }
        notes:        { type: ["string", "null"] }
        paymentRequired: { type: boolean }
        paymentStatus:   { type: string, enum: [not_required, pending, paid, failed, refunded] }
        stripeCheckoutSessionId: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        assessmentId:    { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        assessmentLabel: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        createdAt:    { type: string }

    IcalBookingConflict:
      type: object
      required: [id, providerId, bookingId, bookingScheduledAt, externalStart, externalEnd, detectedAt]
      properties:
        id:                  { type: integer }
        providerId:          { type: integer }
        bookingId:           { type: integer }
        bookingScheduledAt:  { type: string, format: date-time }
        bookingCustomerName: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        bookingServiceName:  { type: ["string", "null"] }
        externalStart:       { type: string, format: date-time }
        externalEnd:         { type: string, format: date-time }
