````yaml
        externalUid:         { type: ["string", "null"] }
        externalSummary:     { type: ["string", "null"] }
        detectedAt:          { type: string, format: date-time }

    BookingInput:
      type: object
      required: [providerId, serviceId, slotId]
      properties:
        providerId:    { type: integer }
        serviceId:     { type: integer }
        slotId:        { type: integer }
        notes:         { type: string }
        assessmentId:  { type: ["integer", "null"] }

    BookingStatusUpdate:
      type: object
      required: [status]
      properties:
        status: { type: string, enum: [confirmed, cancelled, completed] }

    Review:
      type: object
      required: [id, bookingId, customerId, providerId, rating, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:           { type: integer }
        bookingId:    { type: integer }
        customerId:   { type: string }
        customerName: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        providerId:   { type: integer }
        rating:       { type: integer }
        comment:      { type: ["string", "null"] }
        createdAt:    { type: string }

    ReviewInput:
      type: object
      required: [bookingId, rating]
      properties:
        bookingId:  { type: integer }
        rating:     { type: integer }
        comment:    { type: string }

    AiOfferRequest:
      type: object
      required: [providerId, inquiry]
      properties:
        providerId: { type: integer }
        inquiry:    { type: string }

    AiOfferResponse:
      type: object
      required: [offer]
      properties:
        offer:       { type: string }
        estimatedPrice: { type: ["number", "null"] }
        estimatedDuration: { type: ["string", "null"] }

    ProviderDashboard:
      type: object
      required: [totalBookings, pendingBookings, confirmedBookings, completedBookings, totalRevenue, averageRating, recentBookings]
      properties:
        totalBookings:     { type: integer }
        pendingBookings:   { type: integer }
        confirmedBookings: { type: integer }
        completedBookings: { type: integer }
        totalRevenue:      { type: number }
        averageRating:     { type: number }
        recentBookings:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Booking"

    CheckoutSession:
      type: object
      required: [url]
      properties:
        url:       { type: string }
        sessionId: { type: string }

    ConnectStatus:
      type: object
      required: [hasAccount, onboarded, chargesEnabled, payoutsEnabled, detailsSubmitted]
      properties:
        hasAccount:       { type: boolean }
        onboarded:        { type: boolean }
        chargesEnabled:   { type: boolean }
        payoutsEnabled:   { type: boolean }
        detailsSubmitted: { type: boolean }

    ConnectOnboardingLink:
      type: object
      required: [url]
      properties:
        url: { type: string }

    SubscriptionStatus:
      type: object
      required: [tier]
      properties:
        tier: { type: string, enum: [basic, premium] }
        status: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        currentPeriodEnd: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        cancelAtPeriodEnd: { type: boolean }
        priceEur: { type: number }
        world: { type: string, enum: [pro, alltag] }

    PlatformStats:
      type: object
      required: [totalProviders, totalBookings, totalCategories, totalReviews]
      properties:
        totalProviders:   { type: integer }
        totalBookings:    { type: integer }
        totalCategories:  { type: integer }
        totalReviews:     { type: integer }

    AssessmentInput:
      type: object
      required: [label, inputJson, resultJson]
      properties:
        label:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
          maxLength: 200
        addressJson:
          type: ["object", "null"]
          additionalProperties: true
        inputJson:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        resultJson:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        providerId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]

    Assessment:
      type: object
      required: [id, userId, label, inputJson, resultJson, createdAt, updatedAt]
      properties:
        id:           { type: integer }
        userId:       { type: string }
        providerId:   { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        label:        { type: string }
        addressJson:
          type: ["object", "null"]
          additionalProperties: true
        inputJson:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        resultJson:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        createdAt:    { type: string, format: date-time }
        updatedAt:    { type: string, format: date-time }

    GebaeudecheckPackage:
      type: object
      required: [id, credits, amountCents, label]
      properties:
        id:         { type: string }
        credits:    { type: integer }
        amountCents: { type: integer }
        label:      { type: string }

    GebaeudecheckCredits:
      type: object
      required: [balance, packages]
      properties:
        balance: { type: integer }
        packages:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/GebaeudecheckPackage"

    GebaeudecheckCheckoutInput:
      type: object
      required: [packageId]
      properties:
        packageId: { type: string }

    GebaeudecheckReconcileInput:
      type: object
      required: [sessionId]
      properties:
        sessionId: { type: string }

    GebaeudecheckReconcileResult:
      type: object
      required: [granted, balance]
      properties:
        granted: { type: boolean }
        balance: { type: integer }

    OfferItem:
      type: object
      required: [name, durationMinutes, netPrice, vatRate, grossPrice]
      properties:
        serviceId:       { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        name:            { type: string }
        durationMinutes: { type: integer }
        netPrice:        { type: number }
        vatRate:         { type: number }
        grossPrice:      { type: number }

    AcceptOfferInput:
      type: object
      required: [providerId, items, agbVersion]
      properties:
        providerId: { type: integer }
        inquiry:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        offerText:  { type: ["string", "null"] }
        agbVersion: { type: string }
        items:
          type: array
          minItems: 1
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/OfferItem"

    OfferAcceptance:
      type: object
      required: [id, userId, providerId, items, totalNet, totalGross, agbVersion, status, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:         { type: integer }
        userId:     { type: string }
        providerId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        inquiry:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        offerText:  { type: ["string", "null"] }
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/OfferItem"
        totalNet:   { type: number }
        totalGross: { type: number }
        agbVersion: { type: string }
        status:     { type: string }
        createdAt:  { type: string, format: date-time }

    RequestInput:
      type: object
      required: [customerName, customerEmail, categorySlug, title, consentDataShare]
      properties:
        customerName:  { type: string, minLength: 1, maxLength: 200 }
        customerEmail: { type: string, minLength: 3, maxLength: 200 }
        customerPhone: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        categorySlug:  { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        serviceTemplateId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        title:       { type: string, minLength: 1, maxLength: 200 }
        description: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        answers:
          type: ["object", "null"]
          additionalProperties: true
        postalCode: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        city:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        budgetMinCents: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        budgetMaxCents: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        urgency: { type: string, enum: [sofort, zwei_wochen, flexibel] }
        fundingRelevant: { type: boolean }
        maxOffers: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 10 }
        consentDataShare:
          description: >-
            DSGVO: ausdrückliche, freiwillige Einwilligung, die Anfrage an
            passende Anbieter weiterzugeben. Nur ein literal `true` zählt; der
            Zeitstempel wird serverseitig festgehalten.
          type: boolean

    RfqRequest:
      type: object
      required: [id, customerName, customerEmail, categorySlug, title, urgency, fundingRelevant, maxOffers, status, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:            { type: integer }
        customerId:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        customerName:  { type: string }
        customerEmail: { type: string }
        customerPhone: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        categorySlug:  { type: string }
        serviceTemplateId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        title:       { type: string }
        description: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        answers:
          type: ["object", "null"]
          additionalProperties: true
        postalCode: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        city:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        budgetMinCents: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        budgetMaxCents: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        urgency: { type: string }
        fundingRelevant: { type: boolean }
        maxOffers: { type: integer }
        status:    { type: string }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }

    CreateRequestResult:
      type: object
      required: [request, accessToken, matchedProviders]
      properties:
        request: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/RfqRequest" }
        accessToken:
          description: One-time bearer token for guest access to this request's offers (only returned here).
          type: string
        matchedProviders: { type: integer }

    RequestAccessInput:
      type: object
      required: [requestId]
      properties:
        requestId: { type: integer }
        token:
          description: Guest access token (omit when the owning customer is logged in).
          type: ["string", "null"]

    RequestWithOffers:
      type: object
      required: [request, offers]
      properties:
        request: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/RfqRequest" }
        offers:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/RfqOfferWithProvider"

    AcceptRequestOfferInput:
      type: object
      properties:
        token:
          description: Guest access token (omit when the owning customer is logged in).
          type: ["string", "null"]

    RfqRequestForProvider:
      type: object
      required: [id, categorySlug, title, urgency, fundingRelevant, status, contactUnlocked, hasOffered, estimatedLeadPriceCents, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:           { type: integer }
        categorySlug: { type: string }
        serviceTemplateId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        title:       { type: string }
        description: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        answers:
          type: ["object", "null"]
          additionalProperties: true
        postalCode: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        city:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        budgetMinCents: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        budgetMaxCents: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        urgency: { type: string }
        fundingRelevant: { type: boolean }
        status:  { type: string }
        contactUnlocked: { type: boolean }
        hasOffered: { type: boolean }
        estimatedLeadPriceCents:
          description: The lead fee this provider would pay to send an offer (after their tier discount).
          type: integer
        leadFeeId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        offerCount: { type: integer }
        customerName:  { type: ["string", "null"] }
        customerEmail: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        customerPhone: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }

    ProviderOfferInput:
      type: object
      required: [priceCents]
      properties:
        priceCents: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }
        priceType: { type: string, enum: [fixed, hourly, estimate] }
        message: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        availableFrom: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        estimatedDuration: { type: ["string", "null"] }

    RfqOffer:
      type: object
      required: [id, requestId, providerId, priceCents, priceType, status, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:         { type: integer }
        requestId:  { type: integer }
        providerId: { type: integer }
        leadFeeId:  { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        priceCents: { type: integer }
        priceType:  { type: string }
        message:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        availableFrom: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        estimatedDuration: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        status:     { type: string }
        viewedAt:    { type: ["string", "null"], format: date-time }
        respondedAt: { type: ["string", "null"], format: date-time }
        createdAt:   { type: string, format: date-time }

    RfqProviderSummary:
      type: object
      required: [id, displayName]
      properties:
        id:          { type: integer }
        displayName: { type: string }
        category:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        city:        { type: ["string", "null"] }
        rating:      { type: number }
        reviewCount: { type: integer }
        verified:    { type: boolean }
        subscriptionTier: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        avatarUrl:   { type: ["string", "null"] }

    RfqOfferWithProvider:
      type: object
      required: [id, requestId, providerId, priceCents, priceType, status, createdAt, provider]
      properties:
        id:         { type: integer }
        requestId:  { type: integer }
        providerId: { type: integer }
        priceCents: { type: integer }
        priceType:  { type: string }
        message:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        availableFrom: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        estimatedDuration: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        status:     { type: string }
        createdAt:  { type: string, format: date-time }
        provider:   { $ref: "#/components/schemas/RfqProviderSummary" }

    CreateOfferResult:
      type: object
      required: [offer, leadFeeCents, basePriceCents, freeLeadUsed, freeLeadsRemaining, tier, walletBalanceCents]
      properties:
        offer: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/RfqOffer" }
        leadFeeCents:  { type: integer }
        basePriceCents: { type: integer }
        freeLeadUsed:
          description: True when this lead was paid from a free-lead grant (leadFeeCents is then 0).
          type: boolean
        freeLeadsRemaining:
          description: Free leads the provider can still use after this offer.
          type: integer
        tier: { type: string }
        walletBalanceCents: { type: integer }

    LeadEntitlements:
      type: object
      required: [tier, leadsUsed, leadDiscountPct, rankingBoost, freeLeadsRemaining]
      properties:
        tier: { type: string, enum: [basic, premium] }
        maxLeadsMonth:
          description: Monthly lead cap; null = unlimited (premium).
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        leadsUsed: { type: integer }
        leadDiscountPct: { type: number }
        rankingBoost: { type: number }
        freeLeadsRemaining:
          description: Free leads (grants) the provider can still use right now.
          type: integer

    WalletTransactionDto:
      type: object
      required: [id, type, amountCents, balanceAfterCents, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:   { type: integer }
        type: { type: string }
        amountCents: { type: integer }
        balanceAfterCents: { type: integer }
        referenceId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        note: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }

    WalletStatus:
      type: object
      required: [balanceCents, currency, entitlements, transactions]
      properties:
        balanceCents: { type: integer }
        currency: { type: string }
        entitlements: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/LeadEntitlements" }
        transactions:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/WalletTransactionDto"

    WalletTopupInput:
      type: object
      required: [amountCents]
      properties:
        amountCents: { type: integer, minimum: 500, maximum: 100000 }

    LeadRefundInput:
      type: object
      properties:
        reason: { type: ["string", "null"] }

    LeadRefundResult:
      type: object
      required: [ok, refundedCents, balanceCents]
      properties:
        ok: { type: boolean }
        refundedCents: { type: integer }
        balanceCents: { type: integer }

    ImmobilienKundeInput:
      type: object
      required: [typ, firma]
      properties:
        typ:
          type: string
          enum: [privat, hausverwaltung, makler, bestandshalter, bautraeger, genossenschaft, handwerker, gewerbe]
        firma:           { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        ansprechpartner: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        telefon:         { type: ["string", "null"] }
        email:           { type: ["string", "null"] }
        anzahlGebaeude:      { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        wohneinheitenGesamt: { type: ["integer", "null"] }

    ImmobilienKunde:
      type: object
      required: [userId, typ, firma, createdAt, updatedAt]
      properties:
        userId:          { type: string }
        typ:
          type: string
          enum: [privat, hausverwaltung, makler, bestandshalter, bautraeger, genossenschaft, handwerker, gewerbe]
        firma:           { type: string }
        ansprechpartner: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        telefon:         { type: ["string", "null"] }
        email:           { type: ["string", "null"] }
        anzahlGebaeude:      { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        wohneinheitenGesamt: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        createdAt:       { type: string, format: date-time }
        updatedAt:       { type: string, format: date-time }

    ImmobilienPortfolioObjektInput:
      type: object
      required: [bezeichnung]
      properties:
        bezeichnung:   { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        strasse:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        hausnummer:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        plz:           { type: ["string", "null"] }
        ort:           { type: ["string", "null"] }
        gebaeudetyp:   { type: ["string", "null"] }
        baujahr:       { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        wohnflaeche:   { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        wohneinheiten: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        heizung:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        notiz:         { type: ["string", "null"] }

    ImmobilienPortfolioObjekt:
      type: object
      required: [id, userId, bezeichnung, createdAt, updatedAt]
      properties:
        id:            { type: integer }
        userId:        { type: string }
        bezeichnung:   { type: string }
        strasse:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        hausnummer:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        plz:           { type: ["string", "null"] }
        ort:           { type: ["string", "null"] }
        gebaeudetyp:   { type: ["string", "null"] }
        baujahr:       { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        wohnflaeche:   { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        wohneinheiten: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        heizung:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        notiz:         { type: ["string", "null"] }
        createdAt:     { type: string, format: date-time }
        updatedAt:     { type: string, format: date-time }

    VerwalteterKundeInput:
      type: object
      required: [name]
      properties:
        name:              { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        typ:               { type: ["string", "null"] }
        ansprechpartner:   { type: ["string", "null"] }
        telefon:           { type: ["string", "null"] }
        email:             { type: ["string", "null"] }
        notiz:             { type: ["string", "null"] }
        portfolioObjektId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }

    VerwalteterKunde:
      type: object
      required: [id, userId, name, createdAt, updatedAt]
      properties:
        id:                { type: integer }
        userId:            { type: string }
        name:              { type: string }
        typ:               { type: ["string", "null"] }
        ansprechpartner:   { type: ["string", "null"] }
        telefon:           { type: ["string", "null"] }
        email:             { type: ["string", "null"] }
        notiz:             { type: ["string", "null"] }
        portfolioObjektId: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        createdAt:         { type: string, format: date-time }
        updatedAt:         { type: string, format: date-time }

    CustomerProfileInput:
      type: object
      required: [strasse, hausnummer, plz, ort]
      properties:
        strasse:    { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        hausnummer: { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        plz:        { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        ort:        { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        interessen:
          type: array
          maxItems: 3
          items: { type: string }
        quelle:     { type: ["string", "null"] }

    CustomerProfile:
      type: object
      required: [userId, strasse, hausnummer, plz, ort, interessen, createdAt, updatedAt]
      properties:
        userId:     { type: string }
        strasse:    { type: string }
        hausnummer: { type: string }
        plz:        { type: string }
        ort:        { type: string }
        interessen:
          type: array
          items: { type: string }
        quelle:     { type: ["string", "null"] }
        createdAt:  { type: string, format: date-time }
        updatedAt:  { type: string, format: date-time }

    InvoiceSettings:
      type: object
      required: [kleinunternehmer, vatRate, nextInvoiceNumber, autoIssueInvoices]
      properties:
        kleinunternehmer:    { type: boolean }
        vatRate:             { type: string, description: "Numeric percentage as string (e.g. '19.00')" }
        invoicePrefix:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        nextInvoiceNumber:   { type: integer }
        iban:                { type: ["string", "null"] }
        invoiceFooter:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        autoIssueInvoices:   { type: boolean }
        companyLegalName:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        taxId:               { type: ["string", "null"] }
        address:             { type: ["string", "null"] }
        zip:                 { type: ["string", "null"] }
        city:                { type: ["string", "null"] }

    InvoiceSettingsUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        kleinunternehmer:    { type: boolean }
        vatRate:             { type: string }
        invoicePrefix:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        iban:                { type: ["string", "null"] }
        invoiceFooter:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        autoIssueInvoices:   { type: boolean }
        companyLegalName:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        taxId:               { type: ["string", "null"] }
        address:             { type: ["string", "null"] }

    Invoice:
      type: object
      required: [id, providerId, bookingId, invoiceNumber, kind, issuedAt, netCents, taxRate, taxCents, totalCents, currency, serviceName, status]
      properties:
        id:                  { type: integer }
        providerId:          { type: integer }
        bookingId:           { type: integer }
        invoiceNumber:       { type: string }
        kind:                { type: string, enum: [invoice, storno] }
        originalInvoiceId:   { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        issuedAt:            { type: string, format: date-time }
        netCents:            { type: integer }
        taxRate:             { type: string }
        taxCents:            { type: integer }
        totalCents:          { type: integer }
        currency:            { type: string }
        customerName:        { type: ["string", "null"] }
        customerEmail:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        customerAddress:     { type: ["string", "null"] }
        serviceName:         { type: string }
        serviceDescription:  { type: ["string", "null"] }
        status:              { type: string }
        hasPdf:              { type: boolean }

    FoerderProgramm:
      type: object
      required: [id, titel, foerdergeber, ebene, art, foerderquoteText, maxBetragText, kurzbeschreibung, tags, region, aktiv]
      properties:
        id:               { type: string }
        titel:            { type: string }
        foerdergeber:     { type: string }
        ebene:            { type: string }
        art:              { type: string }
        timing:           { type: string }
        foerderquoteText: { type: string }
        quoteMax:         { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        maxBetragText:    { type: string }
        maxBetragEur:     { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        kurzbeschreibung: { type: string }
        besonderheit:     { type: ["string", "null"] }
        quelleUrl:        { type: ["string", "null"] }
        erfolgsquote:     { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        tags:
          type: array
          items: { type: string }
        region:           { type: string }
        aktiv:            { type: boolean }

    FoerderMatchInput:
      type: object
      required: [baujahr, wohnflaeche, heizung]
      properties:
        baujahr:     { type: integer }
        wohnflaeche: { type: number }
        wohneinheiten: { type: ["integer", "null"] }
        heizung:     { type: string, description: "Heating system key e.g. gas, oel, waermepumpe, fernwaerme, pellet" }
        massnahmen:
          type: array
          description: "Selected measure tags the owner is interested in (heizung, daemmung, fenster, pv, komplett)"
          items: { type: string }
        selbstgenutzt: { type: ["boolean", "null"] }

    MassnahmeEstimate:
      type: object
      required: [id, label, art, kostenMin, kostenMax, einsparung, beschreibung]
      properties:
        id:          { type: string }
        label:       { type: string }
        art:         { type: string, enum: [einzelmassnahme, komplettsanierung] }
        kostenMin:   { type: integer }
        kostenMax:   { type: integer }
        einsparung:  { type: string }
        beschreibung: { type: string }
        tags:
          type: array
          items: { type: string }

    FoerderMatchResult:
      type: object
      required: [programme, massnahmen, geschaetzteFoerderungEur]
      properties:
        programme:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/FoerderProgramm"
        massnahmen:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/MassnahmeEstimate"
        geschaetzteFoerderungEur: { type: integer }

    ReportCheckoutInput:
      type: object
      required: [profil]
      properties:
        adresse: { type: ["string", "null"] }
        profil:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        kontakt:
          description: >-
            Optionale Personalien des Käufers (für Registrierung / Zuordnung des
            Reports). Alle Felder optional; die E-Mail wird im Stripe-Checkout
            vorausgefüllt.
          type: object
          properties:
            vorname:   { type: string }
            nachname:  { type: string }
            email:     { type: string }
            telefon:   { type: string }
            anschrift: { type: string }
        financeConsent:
          description: >-
            Förder-Affiliate: separate, freiwillige Einwilligung des Käufers,
            unverbindliche Finanzierungsangebote passender Finanzierungspartner
            zu erhalten. Nur ein literal `true` zählt als Einwilligung. Der
            Nachweis (Version + Wortlaut + Zeitstempel) wird serverseitig
            festgehalten — Client-Werte werden nicht akzeptiert.
          type: boolean

    FoerderschieneReport:
      type: object
      required: [id, status, amountCents, profil, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:          { type: integer }
        userId:      { type: ["string", "null"] }
        sessionId:   { type: ["string", "null"] }
        email:       { type: ["string", "null"] }
        status:      { type: string }
        amountCents: { type: integer }
        adresse:     { type: ["string", "null"] }
        profil:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        createdAt:   { type: string, format: date-time }
        paidAt:      { type: ["string", "null"], format: date-time }

    EnergieausweisOrderInput:
      type: object
      required: [ausweisTyp, kontaktName, kontaktEmail, intake]
      properties:
        ausweisTyp:   { type: string, enum: [bedarf, verbrauch] }
        kontaktName:  { type: string, minLength: 1 }
        kontaktEmail: { type: string, minLength: 3 }
        intake:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    EnergieausweisOrder:
      type: object
      required: [id, userId, ausweisTyp, status, amountCents, kontaktName, kontaktEmail, intake, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:           { type: integer }
        userId:       { type: string }
        sessionId:    { type: ["string", "null"] }
        ausweisTyp:   { type: string }
        status:       { type: string }
        amountCents:  { type: integer }
        kontaktName:  { type: string }
        kontaktEmail: { type: string }
        intake:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        createdAt:    { type: string, format: date-time }
        paidAt:       { type: ["string", "null"], format: date-time }
````

## File: .agents/memory/MEMORY.md
````markdown
- [Klard frontend zod resolver mismatch](klard-zod-resolver.md) — pre-existing dual-zod (v3 pages vs v4 in @hookform/resolvers types); frontend `tsc` fails on all zodResolver pages, app still runs (Vite/esbuild skips typecheck).
- [Klard Stripe v22 Connect split](klard-stripe-connect.md) — booking checkout payout split spread inline (no PaymentIntentData type); commission single source of truth.
- [Förderpilot catalog](foerderpilot-catalog.md) — isolated foerderpilot schema + dedicated pool; SQL bundled via esbuild text loader; filter slug↔name gotcha; base skips-when-populated but idempotent Vorgang/Exposé extension runs every boot; B2B2C/PII routes admin-gated (no Clerk↔nutzer map).
- [Geo proxy (map + geocoding)](geo-proxy.md) — Standortanalyse tiles + address search proxied/cached via `/api/geo/*`, mounted before the global rate limiter with its own generous one.
- [Tailwind v4 font @import order](tailwind-v4-font-import-order.md) — remote `@import url()` fonts must sit ABOVE `@import "tailwindcss"` or PostCSS drops them (silent system-font fallback).
- [New-artifact port probe](artifact-port-reconciler.md) — fresh artifact workflow fails DIDNT_OPEN_A_PORT until a checkpoint runs the .replit port reconciler; finish code, end turn, then restart.
- [Klard unified journey primitives](klard-journey-primitives.md) — shared lib/journey.ts + components/journey/* for status/tier/payment badges, stepper, empty state, guided header; don't re-roll local maps.
- [Klard frontend test setup](klard-test-setup.md) — vitest+testing-library+jsdom; standalone vitest.config.ts (vite.config throws without PORT/BASE_PATH); tests excluded from tsc.
- [Klard account deletion tables](account-deletion-tables.md) — full DELETE /account/me must wipe every user-keyed table (incl. assessments, offer_acceptances, gebaeudecheck_*); DB-first then Clerk for retry-safety.
- [Klard registration flow](klard-registration-flow.md) — customer signup goes straight to /search (no forced chooser; booking needs no immobilien_kunde); Berater via ?intent=berater; booking intent preserved via guarded ?redirect=.
- [Klard provider world separation](klard-provider-world-separation.md) — pro vs alltag is entry/landing/onboarding-scope only (single provider role, no schema); carry world via URL + sessionStorage because Clerk drops the query mid-signup; clear after create.
- [Klard classification v3](klard-classification-v3.md) — Branchen are 2 worlds→14 areas→88 categories; 8 legacy slugs frozen; indicativePrice numeric not int; pricingModel/worldId/leadPriceCents now DRIVE Model B billing (commission vs lead fee); grouping helper duplicated across artifacts.
- [Provider approval gate](provider-approval-gate.md) — Berater need admin Freigabe before going live (approvalStatus pending→approved, separate from verified); gates public GETs/offers/booking via canViewProvider; provider test fixtures must set approvalStatus:"approved".
- [Vitest integration gotchas](vitest-integration-gotchas.md) — api-server route tests under Vitest hang on pino-pretty worker + Proxy-mock `then` trap; mount a minimal app, mock explicit named exports.
- [api-server dev serves stale routes](api-server-dev-stale.md) — after editing api-server route files, restart the workflow before curl-smoke; dev process can serve pre-edit code (e.g. old auth walls).
- [Free-lead grant consumption concurrency](lead-grant-consumption-concurrency.md) — spend small aggregate counter rows with blocking lock-all-rows + guarded decrement, NOT SKIP LOCKED / LIMIT 1 (false-negative wallet debit); downgrade revoke must share the tier-flip tx.
- [Klard customer-app brand palette](klard-brand-palette.md) — brand is turquoise→elegant-blue; `--klard-teal*` tokens are misleadingly named but hold BLUE values; transition lives only in gradients. Don't add literal teal/cyan.
- [Running lib/energie-calc numerically](energie-calc-standalone-run.md) — TS-source libs w/ extensionless imports can't be run via node/tsx/esbuild ad-hoc; typecheck+hand-compute, or vitest inside an artifact.
- [Path-less router.use guard trap](path-less-router-use-trap.md) — bare `router.use(requireAdmin)` on a root-mounted Express router 401s ALL fall-through routes mounted after it; always scope to the path prefix.
- [Förderschiene fulfillment dual-fire](foerderschiene-fulfillment-dual-fire.md) — paid-report side effects run from BOTH webhook + success reconcile concurrently; need DB unique + atomic CAS claim for emails, not read-only dedup.
````
